prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small gray metal cube
  - obj_1: small cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_2: small purple metal sphere
  - obj_3: large gray rubber cylinder
  - obj_4: large gray rubber cube
  - obj_5: small red rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: large purple metal cylinder
  - obj_7: large blue rubber sphere
  - obj_8: small cyan metal cube
  - obj_9: large brown metal sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0101] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0102] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0103] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0104] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0105] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0106] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_4 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0107] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0108] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0109] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0110] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0111] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0112] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0113] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0114] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0115] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0116] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0117] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0118] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0119] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0120] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze 3D distances between objects in the scene. Let me identify the objects from the last image shown:

- obj_0: small gray metal cube
- obj_1: small cyan rubber cylinder
- obj_2: small purple metal sphere
- obj_3: large gray rubber cylinder
- obj_4: large gray rubber cube
- obj_5: small red rubber cylinder
- obj_6: large purple metal cylinder
- obj_7: large blue rubber sphere
- obj_8: small cyan metal cube
- obj_9: large brown metal sphere

Let me estimate positions from the image:
- obj_0 (gray metal cube): front-left area, ground level
- obj_1 (cyan rubber cylinder): left-center area
- obj_2 (purple metal sphere): back-right area
- obj_3 (gray rubber cylinder): back-center area
- obj_4 (gray rubber cube): back-left area
- obj_5 (red rubber cylinder): front-center area
- obj_6 (purple metal cylinder): center area
- obj_7 (blue rubber sphere): left-center area
- obj_8 (cyan metal cube): front-center, slightly right
- obj_9 (brown metal sphere): center-right area

Now let me estimate distances:

- obj_0 to obj_4: obj_0 is front-left, obj_4 is back-left. Moderate distance ~3-4 units
- obj_6 to obj_7: purple cylinder center, blue sphere left. Moderate ~3 units
- obj_6 to obj_8: purple cylinder to cyan cube front. ~3 units
- obj_6 to obj_9: purple cylinder to brown sphere. ~2 units
- obj_7 to obj_8: blue sphere to cyan cube. ~3 units
- obj_7 to obj_9: blue sphere to brown sphere. ~4 units
- obj_8 to obj_9: cyan cube to brown sphere. ~2 units
- obj_0 to obj_5: gray metal cube to red cylinder. ~3 units
- obj_1 to obj_2: cyan cylinder to purple sphere. ~4 units
- obj_1 to obj_3: cyan cylinder to gray cylinder. ~3 units
- obj_1 to obj_4: cyan cylinder to gray cube. ~3 units
- obj_1 to obj_6: cyan cylinder to purple cylinder. ~3 units
- obj_1 to obj_7: cyan cylinder to blue sphere. ~2 units
- obj_1 to obj_8: cyan cylinder to cyan cube. ~4 units
- obj_1 to obj_9: cyan cylinder to brown sphere. ~4 units
- obj_2 to obj_3: purple sphere to gray cylinder. ~4 units
- obj_2 to obj_4: purple sphere to gray cube. ~4 units
- obj_2 to obj_6: purple sphere to purple cylinder. ~3 units
- obj_2 to obj_7: purple sphere to blue sphere. ~4 units
- obj_2 to obj_8: purple sphere to cyan cube. ~3 units
- obj_2 to obj_9: purple sphere to brown sphere. ~3 units
- obj_3 to obj_4: gray cylinder to gray cube. ~2 units
